Rung.Comment:
conveyors have been separated into their own routines for easier monitoring/troubleshooting! This was driven by seqConveyor, but they have been modified to be stand-alone
Originally needed to keep in sync with conveyor handshakes.. robot: need cass --> conv: cass ready --> robot: cass picked --> (do stuff) --> robot: need to place --> conv: ok to place --> robot: cass placed --> loop Conveyor code has been modified to allow us to request a cassette even if we are holding one (so we can pass thru empty's)
if we raise the pallet, we hold it in the grippers and release the conveyor if there is an issue with rfid or cassette type etc, will be kicked to decision steps that will request control of conveyor back
debounce the signal from conveyor in case it flickers while cassette travels
If conveyor says that a cassette is ready, and it is not registering on the LnL sensor after a certain time period.. trigger and alarm or send reset to the conveyor.. TBD
cassette on deck detected with debounce, slight delay to read the part presence sensor in case the cassette bounces against the stop
every time the OnDeck sensor transitions off.. pull the part present status into a storage dint and clear the on deck status
every time the LnL sensor transitions on.. pull the part present status from the storage dint and transfer it into the LnL
Reset Sequence
Permissive for Sequence
If Not In Step Mode, Hold Step Next Off

Main Decision Step If cassette present on startup, go to re-read RFID and check cassette type, then tell robot ready If cassette ready and flagged as empty, go to steps that eject cassette Addeed bit Clear 1 Cathode to Stopping rung due to Stopping being triggered early when clearing 1 Cathode. TKO 10.26.2017
Rung.Text: EQU(seqConveyor_Cathode.Step,0)XIC(seqConveyor_Cathode.Perm)[XIC(System.Auto) ,XIC(seqConveyor_Cathode.StepNext) ][XIO(SeqClearConveyor.Perm) ,XIC(bClearCathodes) ][XIC(System.Stopping) XIO(Bit_WIP_InMachine) XIO(seqRobot.On) XIO(bClear1Cathode) MOV(5,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ,XIC(I_CathodeLane_Running) [XIO(I_Cathode_CassetteReadyforProcessing) [[XIO(actCathodeLNLGripper.ACT.Extend_Complete) ,XIO(I_CathodeCassette_DetectedRaised) ] EQU(seqConveyor_Cathode.Step,0) OTE(iSigToCathodeConv_ReadyForPart.0) ,XIC(actCathodeLNLGripper.ACT.Extend_Complete) XIC(I_CathodeCassette_DetectedRaised) MOV(60,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ] ,XIC(I_Cathode_CassetteReadyforProcessing) XIC(tmrCathCassLnL_OnDelay.DN) [GRT(CathodeCassetteLNLPartPresent,0) [MOV(10,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ,RES(ctuCathodeRFID_ReadRetry) ] ,EQU(CathodeCassetteLNLPartPresent,0) MOV(500,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ] ] ];

Rung.Comment: If stopping, coming to this step will turn off the request for a part.. delay and make sure the conveyor wasn't in the middle of providing a cassette if it was, loop back to 0, raise it, read it then complete
Raise Lift and Locate
Rung.Text: EQU(10,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step)XIC(seqConveyor_Cathode.Perm)XIC(I_CathodeLane_Running)[XIC(System.Auto) ,XIC(seqConveyor_Cathode.StepNext) ][OTL(actLNLCathode.ACT.Extend_Req) ,[XIC(actLNLCathode.ACT.Fault) MOV(20,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ,XIC(actLNLCathode.ACT.Extend_Complete) XIO(I_CathodeCassette_DetectedRaised) OTL(Bit_Cathode_CassetteStuck) OTL(actLNLCathode.ACT.Retract_Req) ] OTL(seqConveyor_Cathode.Fault) ,XIC(actLNLCathode.ACT.Extend_Complete) XIC(I_CathodeCassette_DetectedRaised) MOV(30,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ];

Rung.Comment: Lower Lift and Locate after faulting on raise may need future attention
close pallet retaining gripper at LnL RFID read will also start at this step in parallel and be evaluated at step 35
lower lift and locate
then tell conveyor cassette was picked and wait for cassette ready signal to turn off

check to make sure correct type of cassette is loaded this is a delayed fault because we need to stay in sync with the conveyor this will be looped back to if choosing to retry after incorrect type detected.. in which case the grippers will be closed and the LnL will be lowered, but the logic should be ok to loop back through

Read RFID start reading in parallel when step gets to 30, don't move on until step is current if cassette type is wrong, or debug has read disabled.. don't bother triggering read this will fault out for rfid read though if there is not valid data in the temp variable
hold here if the other rfid is reading, might be issues with the gateway if this happens simultaneously
rfid faults for general comm sometimes.. but then works on retry do a retry once before faulting
decision step, check age, data and cassette type and decide if ok to proceed
cassette is ready - clear request bits

Indicate to robot that the cassette is ready Wait for Robot to pick parts and signal complete or mispick Copy data as soon as part is picked
make sure conveyor sub sequence is idle before moving on
Rung.Text: EQU(100,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step)XIC(seqConveyor_Cathode.Perm)[XIC(System.Auto) ,XIC(seqConveyor_Cathode.StepNext) ][XIC(Sig_Robot_Picked_Cathode) ONS(MachineONS[3].3) [COP(Temp_Cathode_Data,StackData.Cathode_Data_from_RFID,1) ,OTU(ConveyorPickedCathode) ] ,XIO(Sig_Robot_Picked_Cathode) OTE(Bit_ConvCathode_Available) ,EQU(seqConveyor_Cathode_sub.Step,0) [XIC(Sig_Robot_Picked_Cathode) [XIO(Sig_Robot_mispickCathode) MOV(140,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ,XIC(Sig_Robot_mispickCathode) MOV(110,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ,OTU(Sig_Robot_Picked_Cathode) ] ,XIC(System.Stopping) XIO(Bit_WIP_InMachine) XIO(seqRobot.On) XIO(SeqClearConveyor.On) MOV(9000,seqConveyor_Cathode.Step) ] ];

Rung.Comment: bad RFID data, RFID faulted on read, wrong cassette type, age or robot mispick Notification Lockout
prompt for operator decision (RFID read/data issue, age issue, cassette type issue) if operator chooses to retry, check if it was a cassette type issue and send further back in the loop
prompt for operator decision (robot mis pick)
Erase RFID before releasing
tell conveyor we need to place empty cassette onto conveyor
Raise Lift and Locate
Open Gripper
Lower Lift and Locate
Check for Stuck cassette
Signal to conveyor part placed and wait for signal that cassette was received When Clearing only one part. Unlatch Clear 1 Cathode Bit and jump to step 9999. TKO 10.26.2017
empty cassette detected, must follow req conveyor sequencing tell conveyor cassette was picked and wait for cassette ready signal to turn off
End of conveyor sequence lower lift and locate
End of conveyor sequence init outputs to conveyor
~~~~~ cathode conveyor sub routine this is always running when the running signal is true
Reset Sequence
Permissive for Sequence

this sub is always running as long as the estop is ok and conveyor running bit is true make sure main cathode step is idle if empty cassette is present at ondeck sensor, pull it in and send it thru will eventually need to react to commands from downstream stacker requesting parts
empty cassette detected, want to pass it through to improve timing when parts are needed tell conveyor cassette needed and wait for cassette ready signal
empty cassette detected, must follow req conveyor sequencing tell conveyor cassette was picked and wait for cassette ready signal to turn off
Check each layer status and tell conveyor we need another cathode if a can is present and a layer that requres a cathode is idle
Rung.Text: GRT(StackData.Can_Layer.Layer_Status,0)[GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,0) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_1_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[1].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,1) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_2_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[2].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,2) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_3_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[3].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,3) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_4_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[4].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,4) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_5_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[5].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,5) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_6_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[6].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,6) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_7_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[7].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,7) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_8_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[8].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,8) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_9_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[9].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,9) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_10_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[10].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,10) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_11_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[11].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,11) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_12_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[12].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,12) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_13_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[13].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,13) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_14_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[14].Layer_Status,2) ,GRT(Machine_Run_Recipe.Number_of_Layers.Value,14) EQU(Machine_Run_Recipe.Layer_15_Type.Value,2) NEQ(StackData.Layer[15].Layer_Status,2) ]OTE(bWeWillNeedCathode);

Rung.Comment: **** FORCE RFID READ (DEBUGGING) *****
